mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS product_id, p.name AS product_name, ic.name AS company_name, ic.image_url, p.product_type, p.start_date, p.end_date, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ci.name ORDER BY ci.name SEPARATOR ', ') AS coverage_items, MIN(pc.premium) AS min_premium, MAX(pc.premium) AS max_premium, CASE WHEN COUNT(ca.id) >= 10 THEN 5 WHEN COUNT(ca.id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(COUNT(ca.id) / 2) -- 예: 1~9건 → 1~4점 END AS rating FROM insurance_product p JOIN insurance_company ic ON p.company_id = ic.id LEFT JOIN coverage_item ci ON p.id = ci.product_id LEFT JOIN premium_condition pc ON p.id = pc.product_id LEFT JOIN coverage_analysis ca ON p.id = ca.product_id WHERE p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyWord}, '%') -- 검색어 바인딩 GROUP BY p.id, p.name, ic.name, p.product_type, p.start_date, p.end_date ORDER BY p.name ASC

SELECT p.id AS product_id, p.name AS product_name, c.name AS company_name, c.image_url, pc.premium, pc.min_age, pc.max_age FROM customer cu JOIN insurance_product p ON 1=1 JOIN insurance_company c ON p.company_id = c.id JOIN premium_condition pc ON pc.product_id = p.id WHERE cu.id = #{custId} AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, cu.birth_date, CURDATE()) BETWEEN pc.min_age AND pc.max_age AND (pc.gender = cu.gender OR pc.gender IS NULL)

SELECT p.id AS product_id, p.name AS product_name, c.id AS company_id, c.name AS company_name, c.image_url AS image_url, SUM(ci.coverage_amount) AS total_coverage_amount, AVG(pc.premium) AS avg_premium FROM insurance_product p JOIN insurance_company c ON p.company_id = c.id JOIN coverage_item ci ON p.id = ci.product_id JOIN premium_condition pc ON p.id = pc.product_id GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY total_coverage_amount DESC

SELECT p.id AS product_id, p.name AS product_name, c.id AS company_id, c.name AS company_name, c.image_url, pc.premium FROM insurance_product p JOIN insurance_company c ON p.company_id = c.id JOIN premium_condition pc ON p.id = pc.product_id WHERE #{age} BETWEEN pc.min_age AND pc.max_age
AND (pc.gender = #{gender} OR pc.gender IS NULL)
AND pc.gender = #{gender}
ORDER BY pc.premium ASC, p.id ASC
